_comment: Machine-readable profile of what Donat knows and what needs explanation. Agents load this at session start via Read tool and update it when Donat signals ignorance or demonstrated knowledge.
needs_explanation: EnvironmentFile (systemd unit fájl direktíva: env változók betöltése fájlból)

update_protocol.when_donat_asks_mi_az_X: Add to needs_explanation with a parenthetical explanation, then Edit this file
update_protocol.when_donat_uses_term_correctly_without_a: Move to known list, then Edit this file

communication_rules.jargon_policy: Explain in parentheses on first use per session if term is in needs_explanation
forbidden: AI clichés (Természetesen!, Remek kérdés!, Szívesen segítek)
